summary: Verified the BBQ-test ingredient-unit default fix end-to-end on Warehouse Manufacturing → Add Manufactured Product dialog. When 'باربكيو تست' (1 قطعة = 4.2 كغم, 2858 IQD/قطعة) is selected as a raw ingredient, the input-unit dropdown (data-testid='recipe-new-unit') now defaults to 'غرام' (NOT 'قطعة'). Entering quantity 476 then clicking add-ingredient stores it as 0.113 قطعة (input_quantity=476 غرام persisted), with cost 324 IQD — matching 0.113333 × 2858. A toast 'تم تحويل 476 غرام → 0.113 قطعة (4.2 كغم/قطعة)' is shown. Product 'سبيشيال تست' (unit كغم) was created successfully and the recipe persisted correctly via /api/manufactured-products.
critical_code_review_comments: WarehouseManufacturing.js is now ~8400 lines — should be split into modular sub-components (Add/Edit Product dialogs, Recipe Editor, Cost Breakdown card). Maintainability risk is high for future fixes in this file.
seed_data_creation: Used pre-seeded material 'باربكيو تست' (id=rm-bbq-test-001) and created product 'سبيشيال تست' as part of the test (still present in DB after run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recipe-unit-default fix verified. Verification points: (1) recipe-new-unit defaults to غرام when selecting a pack-defined material (1 قطعة = 4.2 كغم); (2) addIngredientToRecipe converts 476 غرام → 0.113333 قطعة via convertWithPackInfo; (3) persisted recipe entry has input_unit=غرام, input_quantity=476, quantity=0.113333 قطعة. Note: a product 'سبيشيال تست' (unit كغم) was created during the test — delete it manually if it interferes with future runs.
